ocr_findings.description: Section icon bullets rendered as '# 00' instead of the orange circle-dot icons in the image. Cosmetic formatting difference only.
The 'もう少し詳しく！' box at page bottom includes an emoji pen glyph in OCR (🖋️) which is not strictly present as text in the image but is harmless. The box content text is faithfully reproduced.

reviewer_notes: Content page on アジャイル開発 background and characteristics, including a 3-column comparison table (ウォーターフォールモデル vs アジャイル開発). Table structure is correctly captured with all three rows and columns intact. Body text faithfully reproduced. Cosmetic icon substitutions only.
